fields.validation_summary: Revalidated 2026-05-31: Edge-backed Playwright rerun passed for memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus/e2e-release/ticket-viewer.release.spec.ts -g "theme settings palette button opens and closes the theme settings panel". Manual browser validation confirmed the ticket-viewer and spec-viewer Theme settings actions both opened a visible .modal-backdrop[role="dialog"][aria-label="Theme settings"] overlay, and screenshots were captured for both viewers after preparing spec-viewer.
